title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Google India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Google India
jsonLd.description:
Google India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
